info.name: ASMS - Apartment Service Management System
info.description:
Complete API collection for the ASMS microservices platform.

## Base URL
Set the `baseUrl` variable to your ALB URL.
Default: `http://k8s-asmsprod-asmsingr-7dc3e4d184-282727532.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com`

## Quick Start
1. Run **00 - Auth → Get Token (ADMIN)** to populate `{{adminToken}}` and `{{token}}`
2. Run **Get Token (OWNER)** to populate `{{ownerToken}}`
3. Run **Get Token (SECURITY)** to populate `{{securityToken}}`
4. Each request automatically uses the correct role token via per-request auth override

## Available Test Users (all password `Test@1234`)
| Username | Role | Token Variable |
|---|---|---|
| `testuser` | ADMIN | `{{adminToken}}` |
| `rwa.member` | RWA_MEMBER | `{{rwaMemberToken}}` |
| `resident` | OWNER | `{{ownerToken}}` |
| `security.guard` | SECURITY | `{{securityToken}}` |

## Role Requirements per Endpoint
- **ADMIN / RWA_MEMBER**: create amenity, list users, manage tickets, list visitors
- **OWNER / TENANT**: create ticket, initiate payment, book amenity, approve/reject visitor
- **SECURITY**: log visitor, check-in/out visitor
- **Any auth**: create user (no auth), helpbot (no auth), get amenity by ID

## Enum Values
**UserRole:** ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, OWNER, TENANT, VENDOR, SECURITY, SUPPORT_STAFF
**AmenityType:** SWIMMING_POOL, GYM, CLUBHOUSE, TENNIS_COURT, BADMINTON_COURT, BANQUET_HALL, LIBRARY, KIDS_PLAY_AREA, TERRACE, OTHER
**TicketCategory:** PLUMBING, ELECTRICAL, CARPENTRY, HOUSEKEEPING, SECURITY, LIFT, WATER_SUPPLY, INTERNET, PARKING, COMMON_AREA, OTHER
**TicketPriority:** P1_CRITICAL, P2_HIGH, P3_MEDIUM, P4_LOW
**PaymentMethod:** UPI, CARD, NET_BANKING, WALLET, CASH
**InvoiceType:** MONTHLY_MAINTENANCE, AMENITY_BOOKING, WATER_CHARGES, PARKING, PENALTY, AD_HOC
**WorkflowType:** VENDOR_ONBOARDING, MAINTENANCE_REQUEST, LEASE_RENEWAL, CONSTRUCTION_PERMIT, FACILITY_BOOKING

variable.description: Default JWT token (ADMIN role). Set by Get Token (ADMIN).
ADMIN role token (testuser). Used by: Create Amenity, List Users, manage tickets.
OWNER role token (resident). Used by: Create Ticket, Initiate Payment, Approve/Reject Visitor, Create Booking.
SECURITY role token (security.guard). Used by: Log Visitor Entry, Check In/Out Visitor.
RWA_MEMBER role token (rwa.member). Used by: Assign Ticket, Resolve Ticket, List Users.
Populated automatically by Create User response script
Populated automatically by Create Amenity response script
Populated automatically by Create Booking response script
Populated automatically by Create Ticket response script
Populated automatically by Log Visitor Entry response script
Populated automatically by Initiate Payment response script
Populated automatically by Generate Invoice response script
Populated automatically by Submit Approval response script

item.name: 00 - Auth
item.description:
Keycloak token operations. Keycloak is exposed through the ALB at /realms/*.

Run each 'Get Token' request for the role you need, then use role-specific endpoints.
Tokens are saved to both {{token}} (default) and the role-specific variable.

exec: console.log('ADMIN token saved. Expires in:', json.expires_in, 'seconds');

request.description:
Logs in as `testuser` (ADMIN role).
Saves token to {{adminToken}} and {{token}}.

Use for: Create Amenity, List Users, Assign/Resolve/Close Ticket, List Visitors.

exec: console.log('OWNER token saved. Expires in:', json.expires_in, 'seconds');

request.description:
Logs in as `resident` (OWNER role).
Saves token to {{ownerToken}}.

Use for: Create Ticket, Initiate Payment, My Payments, Create Booking, Approve/Reject Visitor.

exec: console.log('SECURITY token saved. Expires in:', json.expires_in, 'seconds');

request.description:
Logs in as `security.guard` (SECURITY role).
Saves token to {{securityToken}}.

Use for: Log Visitor Entry, Check In Visitor, Check Out Visitor.

exec: console.log('RWA_MEMBER token saved. Expires in:', json.expires_in, 'seconds');

request.description:
Logs in as `rwa.member` (RWA_MEMBER role).
Saves token to {{rwaMemberToken}}.

Use for: List Users, Assign/Resolve/Close Ticket, List Visitors, List Amenities.

item.name: 01 - Users
item.description:
User registration and management.

POST (create) requires no auth.
GET list requires ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER.
GET by ID requires any authenticated role.

request.description:
No auth required. Saves userId to {{userId}}.

Valid roles: ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, OWNER, TENANT, VENDOR, SECURITY, SUPPORT_STAFF
Requires any authenticated role. Uses {{token}} (ADMIN by default).
Requires ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER role. Uses {{adminToken}}.
ADMIN/RWA_MEMBER can update any user. A user can update themselves (id matches authentication.name).
Requires ADMIN role. Uses {{adminToken}}. GDPR erasure — permanently removes user data.

item.name: 02 - Amenities
item.description:
Amenity and booking management (swimming pool, gym, clubhouse, etc.)

Create/Update/Delete: ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER
Get/List: any authenticated role
Create Booking: OWNER or TENANT

body.raw:
{
  "societyId": "{{societyId}}",
  "name": "Swimming Pool",
  "type": "SWIMMING_POOL",
  "capacity": 30,
  "hourlyRate": 200.00,
  "description": "Olympic-size pool on the terrace level",
  "operatingHours": "06:00-22:00"
}

request.description:
Requires ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER role. Uses {{adminToken}}.
Saves amenityId to {{amenityId}}.

AmenityType enum: SWIMMING_POOL, GYM, CLUBHOUSE, TENNIS_COURT, BADMINTON_COURT, BANQUET_HALL, LIBRARY, KIDS_PLAY_AREA, TERRACE, OTHER
Any authenticated role.
Any authenticated role.
Requires ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER role. Uses {{adminToken}}.
Soft-deactivates the amenity. Requires ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER role. Uses {{adminToken}}.

Requires OWNER or TENANT role. Uses {{ownerToken}}.
Saves bookingId to {{bookingId}}.

slotStart and slotEnd must be ISO-8601 UTC. Overlapping slots return 409 Conflict.
Requires OWNER or TENANT role. Uses {{ownerToken}}.
Returns the booking with status CANCELLED. Requires OWNER or TENANT role. Uses {{ownerToken}}.

item.name: 03 - Support Tickets
item.description:
Support ticket lifecycle: raise → assign → resolve → close

Create: OWNER or TENANT (use {{ownerToken}})
Get/List: ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, SUPPORT_STAFF, OWNER, TENANT
Assign/Resolve/Close: ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER (use {{adminToken}})

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Water leakage in bathroom",
  "description": "There is a water leakage from the ceiling in the master bedroom bathroom. It has been ongoing for 3 days.",
  "category": "PLUMBING",
  "priority": "P2_HIGH",
  "societyId": "{{societyId}}"
}

request.description:
Requires OWNER or TENANT role. Uses {{ownerToken}}.
Saves ticketId to {{ticketId}}.

Category: PLUMBING, ELECTRICAL, CARPENTRY, HOUSEKEEPING, SECURITY, LIFT, WATER_SUPPLY, INTERNET, PARKING, COMMON_AREA, OTHER
Priority: P1_CRITICAL, P2_HIGH, P3_MEDIUM, P4_LOW

NOTE: Using ADMIN token here returns 403 (endpoint is resident-only by design).
Requires ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, SUPPORT_STAFF, OWNER, or TENANT role.

Requires ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, SUPPORT_STAFF, OWNER, or TENANT. Uses {{adminToken}}.
Results are filtered by role — OWNER/TENANT see only their own tickets.

Requires ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER role. Uses {{adminToken}}.
Assigns ticket to a SUPPORT_STAFF user.

query.value: Plumber fixed the pipe. Issue resolved.

request.description: Requires ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, or SUPPORT_STAFF role. Uses {{adminToken}}.

Requires ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER role. Uses {{adminToken}}.
Ticket must be in RESOLVED state first.

item.name: 04 - Visitors
item.description:
Visitor entry lifecycle: log (SECURITY) → approve/reject (OWNER) → check-in → check-out (SECURITY)

Log/Check-In/Check-Out: SECURITY role (use {{securityToken}})
Approve/Reject: OWNER or TENANT (use {{ownerToken}})
List: ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, or SECURITY (use {{adminToken}} or {{securityToken}})

request.description:
Requires SECURITY role. Uses {{securityToken}}.
Saves visitorId to {{visitorId}}.

Field notes:
- visitorPhone: 10-13 digits
- residentUserId: the flat owner/tenant being visited (use {{userId}} from Create User)

Requires OWNER or TENANT role. Uses {{ownerToken}}.
Resident approves the visitor entry.

Requires OWNER or TENANT role. Uses {{ownerToken}}.
Resident rejects the visitor entry.

Requires SECURITY role. Uses {{securityToken}}.
Visitor must be in APPROVED state first.

Requires SECURITY role. Uses {{securityToken}}.
Records visitor departure time.
Requires ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, or SECURITY role. Uses {{adminToken}}.

item.name: 05 - Payments
item.description:
Payment processing — UPI, Card, Net Banking, Wallet, Cash

Create/My Payments: OWNER or TENANT (use {{ownerToken}})
Get by ID: ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, OWNER, or TENANT

request.description:
Requires OWNER or TENANT role. Uses {{ownerToken}}.
Saves paymentId to {{paymentId}}.

PaymentMethod: UPI, CARD, NET_BANKING, WALLET, CASH
referenceType examples: INVOICE, AMENITY_BOOKING
referenceId: ID of the invoice or booking being paid (can be any string if testing standalone)
Requires ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, OWNER, or TENANT role.

Requires OWNER or TENANT role. Uses {{ownerToken}}.
Returns payments for the authenticated user (X-User-Id header injected by api-gateway).

item.name: 06 - Billing
item.description:
Invoice generation and management for maintenance charges, parking, amenities, etc.

Generate: ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER
Get/List: ADMIN, RWA_MEMBER, OWNER, TENANT

request.description:
Requires ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER role. Uses {{adminToken}}.
Saves invoiceId to {{invoiceId}} — use this as referenceId in Initiate Payment.

InvoiceType: MONTHLY_MAINTENANCE, AMENITY_BOOKING, WATER_CHARGES, PARKING, PENALTY, AD_HOC
billingPeriod format: YYYY-MM
Marks the invoice as PAID. Typically triggered after a successful payment. Uses {{adminToken}}.

item.name: 07 - Workflows
item.description:
Multi-stage approval workflows using Chain of Responsibility pattern.

Submit: any authenticated role
Process/Reject: ADMIN or RWA_MEMBER
Approval chain: Security → RWA → Admin

request.description:
Any authenticated role.
Saves workflowId to {{workflowId}}.

WorkflowType: VENDOR_ONBOARDING, MAINTENANCE_REQUEST, LEASE_RENEWAL, CONSTRUCTION_PERMIT, FACILITY_BOOKING
Processed through Chain of Responsibility: Security → RWA → Admin
ApprovalStatus: PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED. Uses {{adminToken}}.

Advances the workflow through the approval chain. Uses {{adminToken}}.
Call multiple times to progress through stages: Security → RWA → Admin.
Uses {{adminToken}}.

item.name: 08 - HelpBot
item.description: Rule-based FAQ assistant. No authentication required.

url.raw: {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/helpbot/ask?query=How do I raise a maintenance request?

query.value: How do I raise a maintenance request?

request.description:
No auth required.
Try: 'How do I pay maintenance?', 'What amenities are available?', 'How to register a visitor?', 'What are the gym timings?'
No auth required.
